News

  1. Jul 2026

    Defended my master's thesis on Western Leopard Toads in 1.2 million camera-trap images—and graduated with distinction.

  2. Jan 2026

    Released Latent Geometry of Taste, my recommender-systems preprint built on 32 million movie ratings.

  3. Dec 2025

    Joined the Machine Learning for Ecology group at AIMS to build computer-vision tools for wildlife monitoring.

  4. Dec 2025

    Co-authored a data-driven framework for spotting at-risk students in Nigerian secondary schools.

  5. Oct 2025

    Spent four wonderfully nerdy days at the AIMS Quantum Learning Algorithms workshop.

  6. Sep 2025

    Presented our multilingual transcription and translation paper virtually at APCIT 2025.

  7. Sep 2025

    Started the AIMS AI for Science master's as a Google DeepMind Scholar and Zeribe Nwosu Foundation Scholar.

  8. Aug 2025

    Gave a lightning talk and presented two posters at the Deep Learning Indaba—and, plot twist, both posters won awards.

  9. Jul 2025

    Presented our machine-learning approach to faster power-grid contingency screening at EIECon 2025.

  10. Jun 2025

    Took Fish-NET to Data Science Africa for a poster session in Ibadan.

  11. Jun 2025

    Joined Rio Eigen as an AI/ML Engineer, building AI products and better annotation tools.

  12. Oct 2024

    Presented Fish-NET at the DSN AI Bootcamp—another poster, another room full of good questions.

  13. Sep 2024

    Graduated from FUNAAB with a B.Eng. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and a 4.40/5.00 CGPA.

  14. Sep 2024

    Published our SHAP vs. LIME study on explaining machine-learning predictions in a Springer volume.

  15. Jun 2024

    Published Fish-NET—AI-powered monitoring and tracking for Nigerian catfish farms.

  16. Feb 2024

    Joined ML Collective and began researching few-shot learning for blood-smear diagnosis.

  17. 2023–24

    Received the Senator Olamilekan Yayi Undergraduate Scholarship in back-to-back academic years.

  18. Sep 2022

    Completed the AWS AI & ML Scholarship and graduated from Udacity's AI Programming with Python Nanodegree.

  19. May 2022

    Facilitated DSN's AI Invasion in Abeokuta, helping more than 150 students get started with AI.

  20. May 2022

    Published explainers on image segmentation, computing Pi, and automating Android with Python.

© 2026 Joshua Salako.

Last updated July 2026
